panel.title: <:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Ticket Center
panel.description:
Please select the ticket you need below. Our team will be with you shortly.

**Super Nova Shop:** Need help? Select the appropriate ticket below for purchases, mediation, or support. Our staff will respond shortly.

<:Bb:1317422045226729564> **Shop Ticket** — Buy products or place an order.
<:med:1317319227476017264> **Ticket Mediator** — Secure middleman for trades.
<:bot:1317341734845546538> **Ticket Support** — Help with issues and questions.
<:aha:1317319223093100555> **Ticket Apply** — Apply to join the team.
panel.footer: Please only open one ticket at a time

welcome.title: Welcome to {guild}! <a:Hearts:1317319217141514321>
welcome.description:
We're glad to have you here, {user}!

<:Bb:1317422045226729564> **Super Nova Shop** is your one-stop spot for great deals — take a moment to look around.
<:bot:1317341734845546538> Check out our info channels to see how everything works.
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Need something? Open a ticket any time and our team will help you out.

You're member **#{memberCount}** — enjoy your stay!

privateStore.title: <a:tbs_letter_A:1317949715383582761> Private Store Menu
privateStore.description:
» Welcome to the **{guild}** Team's Private Store Creator! <a:qfzezeef:1317492452537401404>

Create or manage your exclusive store channel with the options below:

<a:discord:1317320586804068393> **1 Week Store : 150K Credits**
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Full control over your private channel for 7 days.

<a:discord:1317320586804068393> **1 Month Store : 500K Credits**
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Enjoy 30 days of uninterrupted store management.

<a:qfzezeef:1317492452537401404> **Renew Store:**
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Extend an existing store's duration.
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Enter your store's channel ID and choose a new duration.
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Receive a reminder 24 hours before expiration.

<a:tbs_letter_A:1317949715383582761> **How it Works:**
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Select an option, follow the prompts, and complete the payment.
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> Stores are created under the designated category with tailored permissions.
<:emoji_92:1317327882179186748> You'll receive a DM with details upon purchase or renewal.
